name: Okamoto Glass Co., Ltd.
summary: Okamoto Glass Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells special-purpose glass for industrial use and multi-layer film evaporation products. The company offers glass materials, glass molded items, optical/functional coating products, glass bulbs/oceanic spacecraft products, glass frits, and glass winding robots and optical simulation products. Its products are used in mobility, display, telecommunication, sensor/IOT, medical, illumination, energy, and infrastructure/residence applications. Okamoto Glass Co., Ltd. was founded in 1928 and is headquartered in Kashiwa, Japan.
